sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 16:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 16:1
items.html: The Sefira of Malchut that was separated from the inner vessels and became a vessel for the surrounding light is called a house or a hall (see Answers to Topics, item 176). (Part 3, Chapter 5, item 1)
